answer.text:
John’s stated basketball-career goals are to improve and keep progressing as a player. Most explicitly, on 2023-05-21 he said his goal was to “improve my shooting percentage” and that he’d been practicing hard. Later, on 2023-09-21, he said he likes “seeing myself get better and beating goals,” and on 2024-01-02 he said he practices and trains every day “to stay in shape and improve.”

There’s also indirect evidence that he may have goals beyond playing, since Tim said on 2023-09-21 that John had “goals both on and off the court” and was “thinking about the future and building your brand,” but John’s specific off-court goals aren’t stated in the provided context.

golden_answer: improve shooting percentage, win a championship
question: what are John's goals with regards to his basketball career?
